appliedUpdates.description: Added knowledge about missing GCP service account json breaking local upload route to gcp-storage-mocking.md.
Added knowledge about requiring .js extensions in ESM shared packages to typescript-nodenext-esm.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document PowerShell specific behaviors: explicitly quote strings for agent-browser (e.g., "@e6"), and don't use '&' for background tasks (use fireAndForget). Provide guidance on reading fireAndForget temp logs on Windows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple features (revision-history-ui, document-editor-with-autosave) hit PowerShell-specific errors.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a fallback step for verifying UI changes using custom Playwright scripts if agent-browser fails to bind or is unavailable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features tiptap-editor-integration, document-editor-with-autosave, and version-management-ui all resorted to custom Playwright scripts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow an initial alignment pass before strict UI TDD for features that heavily change data shapes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: navigation-tree-editor-ui required deviating from strict TDD to align contracts and mocks first.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the convention of using a dual-cookie strategy (one httpOnly, one client-accessible) for cross-origin authentication proxying in the workspace.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Implemented in workspace-api-connection as an effective security convention.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker had to use a scripted Playwright approach...
